title: 4 Ways Marketers Can Help Sales to Deliver On-Brand Messages
author: Megan Cohn

classification.rationale: Rule-based: problem_solving intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: agentforce, sales_cloud, marketing_cloud. Funnel: awareness.

existing_cta.heading: Optimize campaigns for sellers
existing_cta.body: Learn how you can empower sellers with pre-approved email templates and surface leads with AI-powered alerts.

existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets awareness-stage readers; section is awareness-stage. Product alignment: match.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Introduction — let the reader engage with the content before presenting a CTA.

cta_health_issues: No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Multiple CTAs crowding the top of the article.
CTAs in 100% of sections. This is CTA spam — research shows it reduces engagement 15-20%.
